introSection: Tami Tami is a steel roller coaster located at PortAventura Park in Salou, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain. The ride opened in 1998 and was closed temporarily in 2010 while a part of the area of Polynesia was re-themed to a Sesame Street area for kids known as SésamoAventura. The ride has since reopened.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and brown supports, used to have yellow track and green supports.

fullText:
Tami Tami is a steel roller coaster located at PortAventura Park in Salou, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain. The ride opened in 1998 and was closed temporarily in 2010 while a part of the area of Polynesia was re-themed to a Sesame Street area for kids known as SésamoAventura. The ride has since reopened.



Yellow track and brown supports, used to have yellow track and green supports.
